headline: General Industrial Machinery Stocks Q4 Results: Benchmarking Dover (NYSE:DOV)
summary: As the Q4 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the general industrial machinery industry, including Dover (NYSE:DOV) and its peers.
